name: React Native — React Compiler + Reanimated (MEDIUM)
description: With React Compiler: destructure hook functions early (avoid `router.push` dotting). With Reanimated + compiler: prefer `.get()` / `.set()` on shared values instead of `.value` reads/writes per Reanimated guidance.

metadata.intent: Keep React Compiler and Reanimated shared values compatible and stable

must_use: Destructured stable functions from hooks when compiler is enabled
`.get()`/`.set()` for shared values when required by toolchain
must_not: Dot into unstable objects in hot handlers when it breaks compiler memo keys
conventions: Gate compiler-only rules on project actually enabling React Compiler.

steps.description: Destructure functions from hooks at render top-level (`const { push } = useRouter()`) instead of calling through changing object identities in handlers.
When using React Compiler with Reanimated, prefer `sv.get()` / `sv.set(...)` over direct `.value` access patterns that opt out or confuse static analysis.
